business_problem: Senheng, the biggest consumer electronics retailer in Malaysia (RM1.3B revenue in 2020), wanted to boost the local economy by allowing SMEs to tap into its 3M+ PlusOne member database via a new S-Rewards Centre and reward members with S-Coin cashback, but needed a reliable B2B2C platform partner to synergize operations.
solution_summary: Senheng leveraged Alibaba Cloud's Terminus B2B2C platform to democratize access for 3 million PlusOne loyalty members and empower local Malaysian SMEs through the S-Rewards Centre ecosystem. The platform ingests member behavior, transaction history, and merchant performance data, enabling SME participation in direct selling while rewarding customer engagement through S-Coin cashback. Terminus orchestrates omnichannel order fulfillment across physical retail stores and online channels, with unified loyalty program management across acquisition, retention, and engagement. The solution improved customer return rates by seamlessly integrating 3,000+ merchant partners and suppliers into a coordinated super app ecosystem.
business_outcome: Senheng launched S-Rewards Centre as one of the first Terminus B2B2C implementations in Southeast Asia, improved customer return rate for retail stores, more effectively managed loyalty acquisition/retention/engagement, and is on a path to become a super-app ecosystem connecting PlusOne members, partners, and suppliers.
architecture_clues: Combines B2C, B2B2C, and O2O capabilities in one online platform
evidence_quotes: We are very proud to become one of the first in South East Asia to implement the Terminus B2B2C Solution provided by Alibaba Cloud.
With the launch of the new S-Rewards Centre, PlusOne members can now shop and earn great S-Coin cash back rebate across a wide variety of products.
The successful implementation of the platform has improved the customer return rate for Senheng retail stores.

solution_components.name: Terminus B2B2C
solution_components.role: Omnichannel B2B2C platform enabling SME merchant participation and order fulfillment

solution_components.name: Retail Solutions Platform
solution_components.role: End-to-end retail operations support including loyalty, inventory, and omnichannel capabilities

data_flow: PlusOne member activity → S-Rewards Centre platform → SME/merchant transaction processing → loyalty engagement → order fulfillment
